mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_notification n WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.publish_time IS NOT NULL AND ( n.target_type = 1 OR #{userId} MEMBER OF(n.target_users) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notification_read_records r WHERE r.notification_id = n.notification_id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notification_read_records (notification_id, user_id, read_time) SELECT n.notification_id, #{userId}, NOW() FROM system_notification n WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.publish_time IS NOT NULL AND ( n.target_type = 1 OR #{userId} MEMBER OF(n.target_users) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notification_read_records r WHERE r.notification_id = n.notification_id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )
